span.p: THE HARNESS — identical for every protocol; only the protocol logic is swapped

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

color: rgb(0, 0, 0) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
BUILDER
assembles the system
and loads the workload

div.style: color: rgb(0, 0, 0) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
SCHEDULER
the single run loop
and virtual clock
one turn = the event-loop figure

div.style: color: rgb(0, 0, 0) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
PROTOCOL LOGIC
the only swappable part
a state machine for one
of the three protocols

div.style: color: rgb(0, 0, 0) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
NETWORK
delivers messages with
delay, loss and partitions
(timing only — no CPU
or signature cost)

div.style: color: rgb(0, 0, 0) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
LOGGER
records what happened:
decided, halted, messages

div.style: color: rgb(0, 0, 0) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
INPUT — one experiment-matrix cell + seed
protocol · n = 4 to 25 validators
network conditions: delay, loss, partitions (configure the NETWORK below)
adversary (behaviour + strength) · workload (transactions) · seed

div.style: color: rgb(0, 0, 0) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
REDUCE + RECONCILE
the three emit different kinds of decision — put them on one common scale
(per ACU for overhead · rescale Snowman)

div.style: color: rgb(0, 0, 0) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
OUTPUT — one row of results.csv (one comparable data point)
time-to-finality & throughput (per transaction)
message & byte overhead (per ACU)
reliability: agreement · safety · liveness (defined with the metrics) · run outcome

div.style: color: rgb(0, 0, 0) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: comparison plots that answer the research questions (§3.1)
